final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: interior design editorial photo, landscape crop
Primary request: industrial-style café interior with raw concrete walls, exposed metal pipes, vintage leather sofa, large windows with natural light, and black-and-white photography prints on the wall
Scene/backdrop: spacious café interior, raw exposed concrete walls, overhead metal ductwork and pipes, large floor-to-ceiling windows letting in soft daylight
Subject: vintage worn leather sofa as focal furniture piece, industrial metal shelving, concrete floor, black-and-white framed photography prints arranged on the wall
Style/medium: photorealistic architectural interior photography, editorial
Composition/framing: wide-angle interior shot, 24mm lens, slight perspective depth, balanced symmetry
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light streaming through large windows, warm ambient fill, moody yet refined — rough and stylish atmosphere
Color palette: raw concrete grey + aged brown leather + matte black metal + warm natural light highlights
Materials/textures: bare concrete with visible formwork marks, brushed and patinated metal pipes, cracked and worn leather upholstery, matte industrial flooring
Constraints: preserve the industrial-chic aesthetic balance — gritty raw materials coexisting with curated gallery-style wall art
Avoid: overly polished or sterile look, plastic surfaces, artificial neon lighting, cluttered or messy composition
